title: MYB
description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from MYB, skipping any feeds with errors.

items.title: ‘Mewgenics’ Steam Scores Are Sky-High, And It Instantly Was Profitable
items.description: Mewgenics is on pace to the most successful indie game of the year, making back its budget almost instantly and attracting rave Steam reviews.

items.title: Microsoft Confirms Windows Is Under Attack — Update Now
items.description: Attackers have not waited for Exploit Wednesday; the Microsoft Windows zero-day attacks have already started. Here’s what you need to know and do.

items.title: Netflix’s Best New Movie Has A Record 97% Rotten Tomatoes Audience Score
items.description: Netflix has a new #1 movie on its Top 10 list, one that set a Rotten Tomatoes audience score record when it was originally in theaters.

items.title: Quordle Hints And Answers For Thursday, February 12
items.description: Looking for some help with today’s Quordle words? Some hints and the answers are right here to give you a hand.

items.title: Cannabis Isn’t Harmless — And Normalization Is The Real Risk
items.description: As cannabis replaces alcohol, normalization is outpacing medical awareness. What rising THC use means for teens, mental health and clinical risk.
